response.objective_caption: A black and white close-up portrait of a young woman with long straight hair against a solid black background. response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white close-up portrait of a young woman with long straight hair against a solid black background, exhibiting heavy film grain and rough analog texture throughout.
